variants: Obed Ikechukwu currently resides in Fernshadow Alcove, where he thrives amidst a community of inventive minds. Originally hailing from Skydrop Township, he has made significant contributions to technology, earning him the prestigious Jade Lantern Prize. His notable work, the Basilisk Data Filter, has garnered attention for its impact on data management and security. In addition to his professional achievements, Obed is an enthusiastic member of the Oakspire Arrowmakers League, where he enjoys sharing his craftsmanship and passion for archery.
